$comment: Mario's catalyst watchlist — small/micro-cap names with the profile he flagged on 2026-04-16: low float, news-pivot spike setups (BIRD → AI data center, MYSE/BTOG copycats, IMMP/AGAE/KZIA/LRHC daily gainers with news). These aren't long-term holds — they're the names he wants on screen when a catalyst hits. Edit this file, git push, deploy = updated on site.
